haiku:
Fresh blooms greet the dawn,
Clear lungs breathe in bright, sweet air,
Joyful hearts unite.
Happy #WorldNoTobaccoDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles flicker bright,
Pages turn with joy and light,
Nature's cheer takes flight.
#HappyBirthdayWaltWhitman from @ClamBakeSanta

Old films play softly,
Candles dance on the bright cake,
Cheers to a great life!
#HappyBirthdayClintEastwood from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright orb in the sky,
Silver beams dance on the lake,
Night wraps us in peace.
Happy #FullMoon from @ClamBakeSanta

Warm cake cools on racks,
Crushed nuts and sweet cream unite,
Joyous bites to share.
Happy #NationalHazelnutCakeDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Cows graze on green fields,
Creamy clouds swirl in bright bowls,
Joy splashes like milk.
Happy #WorldMilkDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Laughter fills the air,
Soft cake glimmers with bright light,
Candles spark pure joy.
#HappyBirthdayMarilynMonroe from @ClamBakeSanta
